title: Corelib API completion after matrix green (collections + host FS)
body:
Narrowed to **Wave 5 API completion** only — intentional count-only stubs remain until `corelib-matrix-green` (42/42) exits.

## Scope (after matrix green)

- Collection backing storage wiring → `corelib-collections-storage-wiring`
- Host-backed `System.FS` → `corelib-system-fs-host-backed`
- pckg publish evidence → `corelib-quality-pckg-publish-main`

## Landed (infra, not API semantics)

- Corelib shapes and spine tests on main (`b73d49d`, `e628d08`)
- Import codemod + typecheck gates (wave tasks Done)

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Catalog tip:** [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf) (2026-06-07)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `compiler-corelib`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-corelib-complete`
